context.description:
•	Graphics Tracker is the Primary tool for Pursuit Services graphics support on Word response documents which is used for submitting and tracking progress of graphic requests, and inventory management for future reference/reuse. It is also used for storage of completed graphic files, associated templates, and production materials

•	Review RFX/project scope, design & submission requirements
•	Consult with deal team to gather and assess client insights and win themes
•	Discuss and brainstorm with deal team for materials to support submission/meeting
•	Create document templates complying with client and RFX requirements/branding
•	Leverage repository of reusable graphics/assets to create custom graphics
•	Use the Graphics tracker to track status for word only
•	Create graphics tracker to track status of individual graphics files
•	Update graphics tracker where graphics modifications requested - new slide within the file is created for each modification
•	Paste completed graphics files to Word file
•	Use iterative review cycle to refine graphics based on input from deal team
•	Format final documents and conduct quality check
•	Prepare files for final print production or digital submission
•	Confirm all final files have been uploaded for archiving/harvesting
context.scope:
In-Scope Activities
Activity/ Scenario	Location/ Geography	FTEs (Production FTEs)	Operating Window
Automate the Graphic Control number using the following naming convention: Opp ID, Year and Order	All Markets	262	Windows
context.objectives:
This section to cover all relevant metrics used to gauge the process performance for all activities in scope

Process Performance	
Activity	Average Monthly Volume (6 Months)	Average Handling Time	Seasonal peak Volume if applicable	Turnaround Time	Any other SLA
	FTEs	Additional Comments (Kick off and Cut-off time)
Pursuit Services - Graphic Tracker Autonumbering	58050 approx.	2 mins/per graphic	N/A	2 mins/per graphic	N/A	224	N/A

The above table is indicative only and actual timelines may vary from deal to deal. Also, we expect the volume handled to increase by 10-20% in FY25.
context.criteria:
•	Draft Graphic request is submitted on the tracker.
•	All Graphic must be modified in some way to be incorporated into the proposal response and must be logged for tracking purposes.
•	A notification can be sent to the designer that a new item has been added to the tracker. 
•	The designer updates the tracker that the Graphic is In Progress.
•	Designer notifies the submitter that this is now completed, reviewer will review and update status of Graphic Tracker Request Item if any edits or changes needed
•	Graphic tracker is updated to complete status once received confirmation from requestor that this can be incorporated into the proposal response and no further edits are required.

btResponses.1:
Order is the unique graphic number generated by the Graphics Tracker. This number will always be four numeric characters (e.g., 0001, 0999) 

Title  : ABC
	
Graphic Control Number : 000007.26.0001 

000007 is opportunity ID, 26 is the year like 2026, 0001 is the order
btResponses.2: Its not editable once generated it's auto populate everywhere in read only mode
btResponses.3: The Graphic Tracker Autonumbering Power App is built on Microsoft Power Platform and integrates with Microsoft Teams, Dataverse and SharePoint
btResponses.5: This numbers are autogenerated so failure scenario will  not come this can be happen only if power automate plateform will be down and below 1 business rule we have : - Team and Channel dropdowns display only Teams/Channels user is part of
btResponses.6: No its not required as it is very simple and straightforward application
btResponses.7:
After successful run below email will trigger and its the indicate of successful process:Email Notifications – In edit list, user can have option to toggle between email notifications as on/off to receive email notifications whenever there is a status change with that list item to the author. The field will be a toggle and will be called “Email status updates to Author”. 

  

Dear Author/SME, 
 
We are pleased to inform you that the graphic for your proposal has been completed. Below are the details of the completed graphic: 

Title : ABC

Graphic Control Number : 000007.26.0001  

Author/SME/Contact  : Name 

Submitted By : GraphicTrackerAutonu 

If you have any questions or need further assistance, please feel free to reach out to the assigned Graphic Designer. 
 
If you require any modifications to the completed graphics, you can edit the status of the graphic to “Status.” Please provide the necessary details and instructions for the modifications through this link - Go to the tracker 
 
Thank you. 
 
Note: This is an automatically generated email, please do not reply.
